steps.name: Investigation and Planning
steps.description: Investigate v3 tests and v4 implementation. Catalog all gaps and differences. Produce detailed plan.

steps.name: Create BallotAnalyzer service
steps.description: Create backend/Services/Analyzers/BallotAnalyzer.cs with DetermineStatusFromVotes method. Port v3 BallotAnalyzer logic. Create BallotVoteInfo DTO. Write 14 unit tests in Backend.Tests/UnitTests/BallotAnalyzerTests.cs.

steps.name: Fix ElectionAnalyzerBase tie analysis logic
steps.description: Rewrite FinalizeResultsAndTies to match v3: DetermineOrderAndSections (sort by VoteCount+TieBreakCount+name), AnalyzeForTies (CloseTo includes diff=0, create ResultTie for ALL groups), AnalyzeTieGroup (correct NumToElect, ForceShowInOther, IsTieResolved/IsResolved). Remove zero-VoteCount results.

steps.name: Fix ElectionAnalyzerBase ballot statistics and summary logic
steps.description: Integrate BallotAnalyzer into PrepareForAnalysisAsync. Add FillResultSummaryCalc (voting method counts). Add CombineCalcAndManualSummaries. Fix FinalizeSummaries (UseOnReports logic). Add NumBallotsWithManual/SumOfEnvelopesCollected computed properties.

steps.name: Fix ElectionAnalyzerSingleName statistics
steps.description: Override statistics for single-name: BallotsReceived=NumVoters=TotalVotes=sum of SingleNameElectionCount. SpoiledVotes=sum of counts for non-Ok votes. BallotsNeedingReview=count of votes needing review.

steps.name: Write ElectionAnalyzerNormal unit tests
steps.description: Create Backend.Tests/UnitTests/ElectionAnalyzerNormalTests.cs. Port all 15 v3 AnalyzerNormalTests: Ballot_TwoPeople, NameChanged, NameExtended, AllSpoiled, OlderYouth, Tie_Not_Required, 3_way_Tie, TwoSetsOfTies, TieSpanningTopExtraOther, TieBreak resolution tests, NSA election, TwoStage election.

steps.name: Write ElectionAnalyzerSingleName unit tests
steps.description: Create Backend.Tests/UnitTests/ElectionAnalyzerSingleNameTests.cs. Port all 9 v3 AnalyzerSingleNameTests: Election_3_people, With_Manual_Results, Tie, SingleNameElection_1_person, Invalid_Ballots, Invalid_People, 3_people, 3_people_with_Tie, 3_way_Tie.

steps.name: Update existing TallyServiceTests for compatibility
steps.description: Run existing TallyServiceTests. Fix failing assertions for corrected v3-compatible behavior (NumToElect per-group, CloseTo includes ties, ballot status re-evaluation). Do not weaken assertions.

steps.name: Final validation
steps.description: Run full test suite: dotnet build + dotnet test. Verify all tests pass and test count increased significantly.
